chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1199 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. No.6579/2023 For orders on M.A. No.6580/2023 For hearing of main case. 31.10.2024 Syed Shafique Ahmed Shah Advocate for Petitioner. ----- Petitioner has challenged the Order of Election Tribunal which has dismissed the Application of Petitioner under Order VII Rule 11 CPC. Counsel contended that the Election Petition is still pending. The hierarchy is mentioned in the Election Rules 2015. Consequently, this Petition is not maintainable and is dismissed along with pending Applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
